💳 Payment System Test

Test Payment Processing

Test the payment API endpoints:

📋 Complete Payment Flow

  1. Build CV: Go to CV Builder
  2. Fill Form: Complete all CV fields
  3. Preview: Review your CV
  4. Download: Click "Download CV" button
  5. Payment: Complete payment form
  6. Success: CV downloaded automatically

🗄️ Database Schema

Payment Collection:

{
  userId: ObjectId,
  cvData: {
    fullName: String,
    email: String,
    phone: String,
    address: String,
    education: String,
    skills: String,
    experience: String,
    careerObjective: String
  },
  paymentDetails: {
    amount: Number (9.99),
    currency: String ("USD"),
    paymentMethod: String ("card"|"paypal"),
    transactionId: String (unique),
    paymentStatus: String ("pending"|"processing"|"completed"|"failed"),
    cardLastFour: String,
    paymentProvider: String ("stripe")
  },
  downloadInfo: {
    downloadCount: Number,
    lastDownloadedAt: Date,
    downloadUrl: String
  },
  createdAt: Date,
  updatedAt: Date
}
